text.title: Adapting the pattern per delivery surface
text.summary: The phase sequence and prompt files are stable; per-surface differences (verify command, e2e tooling, deploy mechanism, parallelism heuristics) are encoded in playbooks under `playbooks/` and in reference docs under `reference/`.

section.title: Playbook scope
section.p: A playbook is a short Markdown file recording the per-surface choices for each phase: which build command verifies, which test runner exercises end-to-end, which deploy script runs, which files are typically touched together (informing the wave planner). It does NOT redefine the phase order or the prompt-file contracts.
section.reference: Skeleton showing the canonical playbook shape.

list.item: `faion-net-be/` ŌĆö Django backend; verify with `ruff` + `pytest` + Django check; deploy via `deploy-be.sh` (api.faion.net or api-dev.faion.net ŌĆö disambiguate).
`faion-net-fe/` ŌĆö Gatsby frontend (faion.net + dev.faion.net); verify with `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build`; deploy via `deploy-fe-dev.sh` or `deploy-fe-prod.sh`.
`faion-net-e2e/` ŌĆö Playwright suite; verify with `npm run test`; no deploy.
`faion-network/` (this repo) ŌĆö knowledge methodologies and skills; verify with `validate-methodology-xml.py`; no deploy (loaded via `~/workspace/.claude` symlink).
`faion-network-storybook/` ŌĆö component library; verify with `npm run build-storybook`; deploy via `deploy-storybook.sh`.
`mediamanager_fe/`, `neromedia-faion-net/gatsby/`, `pashtelka-faion-net/gatsby/`, `longlife-faion-net/gatsby/` ŌĆö Gatsby content surfaces; per-pipeline `deploy-gh.sh`.
`mediamanager_be/`, `neromedia-faion-net/`, content pipelines ŌĆö Python jobs; verify with `ruff` + smoke run on a fixture; deploy via systemd reload on `nero-prod`.
Build / verify command per surface (see list above).
End-to-end runner: Playwright for UI, request runner / `pytest` for API, fixture-driven smoke for ETL.
Deploy mechanism: `deploy-*.sh` script per surface; `op-unlock` is required first when secrets are needed.
Local environment: `.env` files, hosts entries for `*.faion.net`, Docker compose for `searxng` / `n8n`.
Code-style focus areas in review (Django anti-patterns, Gatsby SSR pitfalls, Playwright flake patterns, methodology XML closed-tag glossary).

section.title: Reference docs
section.p: Cross-cutting knowledge that more than one playbook needs goes under `reference/`:

list.item: `reference/git-conventions.md` ŌĆö branch flow per repo, 50-char title, CHANGELOG `[Unreleased]`, no `--no-verify`, no `Co-Authored-By`, no emojis.
`reference/sdd-conventions.md` ŌĆö `.aidocs/` lifecycle, document types (`spec.md`, `design.md`, `test-plan.md`, `implementation-plan.md`), token estimates instead of time.
`reference/delivery-channel.md` ŌĆö Telegram via `tg-send`, chat IDs, message format limits.
`reference/screenshot-strategy.md` ŌĆö focused capture, outline colours, viewport, headless fallback.
`reference/quota-gate.md` ŌĆö `/tmp/claude-session-state.json` schema, default 50% threshold, hop pattern via `ScheduleWakeup`.

section.title: When a new playbook is justified

list.item: A new delivery surface enters the workflow (new repo, new artifact type).
An existing playbook would need more than two phase-specific overrides ŌĆö split instead of bloating.
A new domain has materially different verify/test/deploy mechanics.

section.p: If only one or two phases differ, prefer a small note in the existing playbook over a new file.
